exploration_notes: The GCC optimization pass infrastructure follows this dependency chain: (1) `gcc/passes.def` is the master declarative list using macros `NEXT_PASS`, `INSERT_PASSES_AFTER`, and `TERMINATE_PASS_LIST` to define the full pass execution order — DCE appears multiple times via `NEXT_PASS(pass_dce)` and `NEXT_PASS(pass_cd_dce)`. (2) `gcc/passes.cc` implements the `pass_manager` class: its constructor (`pass_manager::pass_manager` at line 1577) includes `passes.def` to build the pass tree, `execute_pass
